text: Kimmel Pushes Back Against White House And FLOTUS Criticism Of ‘Expectant Widow’ Joke - Forbes
fullText: Kimmel’s remarks about the shooting follow calls for his firing by President Donald Trump for a joke last week where he said Melania Trump had “a glow like an expectant widow.”

text: Pompeii archaeologists use AI to reconstruct man killed in volcano's eruption - NPR
fullText: Archaeologists have used AI for the first time to digitally reconstruct the face of a man killed in the AD 79 eruption of Mount Vesuvius, offering a new way to understand one of history's most famous natural disasters.

text: "DeSantis Dummymander": Democrats heap ridicule on Florida's proposed House maps - Axios
fullText: "Meatball Ron's Dummymander will not save Republicans," said one Democratic spokesperson.

text: Iranian foreign minister meets with Putin as U.S.-Iran talks falter - The Washington Post
fullText: The trip comes as Iranian negotiators seek separate tracks for a deal over the Strait of Hormuz and talks on broader peace, including nuclear issues.

text: Trump wants a correspondents’ dinner redo. Critics aren’t convinced. - The Washington Post
fullText: The president’s calls to reschedule the White House correspondents’ dinner have renewed criticism of the event, which some say no longer fits an adversarial press era.

text: Supreme Court considers blocking lawsuits alleging weed killer causes cancer - The Washington Post
fullText: Thousands of cancer victims allege Roundup was responsible for their illness, in one of the largest waves of product liability litigation in U.S. history.

text: Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI - The Verge
fullText: Elon Musk’s lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI is going to trial, and we’ll have all the latest updates about the maker of ChatGPT.

text: Violence escalates in Colombia with dozens of attacks before presidential vote - AP News
fullText: A series of attacks in Colombia's southwest has raised security concerns before the May presidential election. Rebel groups have staged 26 attacks since Friday. The death toll in a Saturday blast rose to 21 people on Monday. Authorities blame the FARC-EMC gro…

text: Kim Jong Un Confirms Soldier ‘Self-Blasting’ Policy in Ukraine - Bloomberg.com
fullText: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un confirmed a policy that requires soldiers to commit suicide on the battlefield to avoid capture, while fighting Russia’s war against Ukraine.

text: Red Sox Add Interim Coaches To Staff - MLB Trade Rumors
fullText: The Red Sox are still patching together a coaching staff after this week's red wedding.

text: Ty Simpson says he had "secret meeting" with Sean McVay before draft - NBC Sports
fullText: Simpson previously had said he had only a "brief" meeting with Rams scouts at the Alabama Pro Day.

text: In pictures: King Charles and Queen Camilla begin US state visit - BBC
fullText: King Charles III and Queen Camilla were greeted by a military band and honour guard as they arrived for their four-day state visit.

text: Brother of suspect in deaths of 2 Tampa doctoral students: "We tried to warn police in the past" - CBS News
fullText: Ahmad Abugharbieh, the younger brother of the man suspected of killing two University of South Florida doctoral students, told CBS News, "My entire family feels so much shame and guilt."

text: Google is testing AI chatbot search for YouTube - The Verge
fullText: Google is trying out an AI Mode-like search called “Ask YouTube” that builds a result page with videos, Shorts, and text.

text: South Carolina's measles outbreak is over. But more are brewing around the country - NPR
fullText: The virus infected nearly 1,000 people in the state before the state declared it over. Meanwhile, cases are spreading across many parts of the U.S., with more than 20 outbreaks currently active.

text: Qualcomm stock draws attention after major OpenAI news - thestreet.com
fullText: QCOM shares reacted to a major development with the AI giant ahead of earnings this week.

text: LIV Golf reportedly postpones June tournament in New Orleans - Golf Channel
fullText: LIV New Orleans was a new addition to this year’s LIV schedule, originally slated for June 25-28 at Bayou Oaks at City Park.
